headline: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:VRTX) Beats Q1 Estimates as New Drug Launches Drive Diversification
summary: Vertex beats Q1 estimates with $2.99B revenue as CF drug ALYFTREK surges and non-CF launches like CASGEVY and JOURNAVX drive diversification.

headline: Vertex (VRTX) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: In addition to this commercialization focus, research and clinical progress remain paramount.  Before I cover R&D highlights for the quarter, I would like to acknowledge our CSO, David Altshuler's retirement a year from now and the planned CSO transition to Mark Bunnage, our current SVP and Global Head of Research.
